titleStmt.title: SII 5.1337: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri

No. 1337. (A.R. No. 386-J of 1896). ON THE SAME PILLAR. A very fine figure of Balarؤپ0ma with the plough in his left hand, the right hanging down and on the head of a standing figure, is inserted in the wall of the shrine with the ؤ€ل¸»vؤپrs. People on the spot say that it is purposely so placed to hide the entrance into the treasure called إڑankhanidhi. So is a figure of Srؤ«0nivؤپ0sa found on the corresponding left side hiding the entrance into the Padmanidhi.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
